chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2172 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No. 10875/2025 2. For order on office objections No. 1 to 8 3. For order on Misc. No. 10876/2025 4. For order on Misc. No. 10877/2025 5. For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Mrs. Nazish Jahangiri advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner has lodged a complaint under the SCRM application of SBCA, which, as of now, has not been decided. As such, this petition is premature and is accordingly disposed of, along with all pending applications. However, a copy of this order shall be sent to the DG, SBCA, who shall ensure that the petitioner’s application is decided within the timeframe stipulated in the SBCA SOPs. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
